# `library_codex.math.Matrix`

動的法の行列演算・rank/det/inverse/連立方程式・特性多項式。

- 計算量の目安: 密行列主要演算 $O(N^3)$
- source: [`math/Matrix.py`](../../../math/Matrix.py)
- 公開API: function 15、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.math.Matrix import (
    identity_matrix,
    transpose_matrix,
    rotate_matrix,
    matrix_add,
    matrix_subtract,
    matrix_multiply,
    matrix_vector_multiply,
    matrix_power,
    gauss_elimination,
    matrix_rank,
    matrix_determinant,
    inverse_matrix,
    linear_equation,
    sparse_linear_equation,
    characteristic_polynomial,
)
```
